pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.7 to 3.4.5 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks Jakarta EE 9+ namespace support required for modern libraries.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce incompatible bytecode if the source/target levels remain at 17 while using Java 21 features or libraries.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the --enable-preview compiler argument as preview features are no longer used or required.
pom.xml.why_exists: The --enable-preview flag is unnecessary for standard Java 21 compilation and may cause issues if not explicitly supported by the toolchain configuration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the --enable-preview argument from the Surefire plugin configuration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Tests will fail to run if the JVM is invoked with --enable-preview but the code does not use preview features, or if the flag is invalid in the new context.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-compiler-plugin with explicit executions to handle annotation processor compilation order.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation fails due to circular dependency or missing class issues when annotation processors are compiled in the same pass as the code they process.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update JaCoCo version to 0.8.12 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 class files.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions cannot instrument or analyze class files compiled with Java 21, leading to build failures or missing coverage data.

src/main/resources/META-INF/spring.facto.general_idea: Update the auto-configuration class reference in spring.factories to point to the new ConfigScan class instead of the old RedisConfiguration class.
src/main/resources/META-INF/spring.facto.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires the correct auto-configuration class to be registered; referencing a removed or renamed class would result in a ClassNotFoundException or failure to load the intended configuration at runtime.
